accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence. This is a VLM-assisted visual disposition for source legibility, question boundary, diagram presence, and cross-page continuity only; it is not authority alignment or production-ready approval. VLM notes: Single-page question crop; all parts (a) and (b) present and legible. Watermark present but does not impair readability or question integrity. No diagrams/tables required for this question; boundary fully captured. Cross-page continuity not applicable (single page).
